headline: GDX: Making Sense Of Gold Miners' Lagging Performance
summary: The VanEck Gold Miners ETF has struggled since making all-time highs earlier this year. Here's what investors need to know about GDX.

headline: Is Aura Minerals Positioned for Stronger GEO Growth in 2026?
summary: AUGO's Q1 2026 GEO production rose 37% year over year, driven by Borborema ramp-up, MSG contribution and stronger output at Almas.
